scientific_question: Can a model selected only on historical BACE1 measurements generalize to later, non-overlapping chemical matter and recover the most active late-period compounds?
public_source: ChEMBL target CHEMBL4822 (Beta-secretase 1, Homo sapiens, SINGLE PROTEIN)

candidate_models: RandomForestRegressor with at most 100 trees and n_jobs=1
ExtraTreesRegressor with at most 100 trees and n_jobs=1
model_selection.features: RDKit Morgan fingerprint (radius 2, 1024 bits) plus lightweight RDKit descriptors

required_ranking_metrics: Recall of external top-10% actives at k=10%

claim_boundary: Retrospective temporal external validation using public labels; not prospective wet-lab validation and not a claim of a newly discovered inhibitor.
